poems.poem:
File not found

File Not Found, where echoes fall.
File Not Found, where echoes fall.
File Not Found, where echoes fall.
File Not Found, where echoes fall.

Permission denied

In permission denied, the shadows sleep.
In permission denied, the shadows sleep.
In permission denied, the shadows sleep.
In permission denied, the shadows sleep.

Invalid value

In invalid value, the shadows sleep.
In invalid value, the shadows sleep.
In invalid value, the shadows sleep.
In invalid value, the shadows sleep.

Incompatible type

In incompatible type, the shadows sleep.
In incompatible type, the shadows sleep.
In incompatible type, the shadows sleep.
In incompatible type, the shadows sleep.

Key not found

Key Not Found, where echoes fall.
Key Not Found, where echoes fall.
Key Not Found, where echoes fall.
Key Not Found, where echoes fall.

Runtime error occurred

Runtime Error Occurred, where echoes fall.
Runtime Error Occurred, where echoes fall.
Runtime Error Occurred, where echoes fall.
Runtime Error Occurred, where echoes fall.

Module not found

Module Not Found, where echoes fall.
Module Not Found, where echoes fall.
Module Not Found, where echoes fall.
Module Not Found, where echoes fall.

Index out of range

Index Out Of, where echoes fall.
Index Out Of, where echoes fall.
Index Out Of, where echoes fall.
Index Out Of, where echoes fall.

Syntax error

In syntax error, the shadows sleep.
In syntax error, the shadows sleep.
In syntax error, the shadows sleep.
In syntax error, the shadows sleep.

Lookup error

In lookup error, the shadows sleep.
In lookup error, the shadows sleep.
In lookup error, the shadows sleep.
In lookup error, the shadows sleep.

Memory error

In memory error, the shadows sleep.
In memory error, the shadows sleep.
In memory error, the shadows sleep.
In memory error, the shadows sleep.

Division by zero

Division By Zero, where echoes fall.
Division By Zero, where echoes fall.
Division By Zero, where echoes fall.
Division By Zero, where echoes fall.

Numerical operation overflow

Numerical Operation Overflow, where echoes fall.
Numerical Operation Overflow, where echoes fall.
Numerical Operation Overflow, where echoes fall.
Numerical Operation Overflow, where echoes fall.

Operation not implemented

Operation Not Implemented, where echoes fall.
Operation Not Implemented, where echoes fall.
Operation Not Implemented, where echoes fall.
Operation Not Implemented, where echoes fall.
